news.summary: The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings report on Thursday, May 8, after the market closes. Analysts are predicting the Ventura, California-based company to post earnings of 25 cents per share for the quarter, slightly below the 26 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Trade Desk is expected to disclose quarterly revenue of $575.28 million, showing an increase from the $491.25 million recorded a year ago according to data from Benzinga Pro. Shares of Trade Desk closed at $56.46 on Wednesday, marking a 1.5% increase. For more details and accurate analyst ratings, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.
news.headline: Wall Street analysts expect The Trade Desk (NASDAQ: TTD) to report Q1 earnings of 25 cents/share, down from 26 cents last year, with projected revenue of $575.28 million, up from $491.25 million. Shares rose 1.5% to $56.46.

news.summary: McKesson Corporation is set to announce its Q4 financial results soon, with analysts forecasting earnings at $9.83 per share, a significant increase from last year's $6.18 per share. The company is expected to post quarterly revenue of $94.2 billion, up from $76.36 billion in the previous year. BofA Securities analyst, Michael Cherny, has reiterated a Buy rating on McKesson with a revised price target of $755, up from $665. Investors are also looking at the company's dividend potential, with McKesson currently offering an annual dividend yield of 0.39%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of 71 cents per share ($2.84 annually). For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: McKesson to release Q4 results, expecting $9.83/share earnings (up from $6.18) and $94.2 billion revenue (up from $76.36 billion).

news.summary: In Owens Cross Roads, Alabama, Alquist utilized 3D printing technology to construct a Walmart expansion in just 75 hours. This remarkable feat resulted in a 50% reduction in construction time compared to traditional methods. Additionally, the 3D-printed walls are three times stronger, showcasing the efficiency and durability of this innovative approach.
news.headline: Walmart's Alabama Supercenter gets 3D printed expansion by Alquist in 75 hours, 50% faster, with 3x stronger walls.

news.summary: In Ocala, Florida, on May 1, 2025, the Love Israel Foundation USA revealed a reinvigorated alliance with longtime partner Holy Spirit Tel Aviv (previously Love Israel Tel Aviv). This partnership aims to bolster a significant endeavor: the establishment and growth of the Prayer initiative.
news.headline: Love Israel Foundation USA teams up with Holy Spirit Tel Aviv to aid Prayer Garden Project in Israel. Great news for supporters!

news.summary: In Los Angeles on May 8, 2025, Sidecar Health, a leading consumer-driven health insurance provider, revealed an update to its member services by incorporating clinical quality scores. This move reinforces their dedication to empowering members with comprehensive information about healthcare providers. The company continues to prioritize enhancing the experience for its members by ensuring access to high-quality care.
news.headline: Sidecar Health adds clinical quality scores to empower members with transparent information, enhancing member experience.

news.summary: A recent announcement from Design Power, Inc. based in San Jose, California, highlighted their new innovation - the Design++® Warehouse Configurator demonstration for Tekla Structures. This advancement is designed to streamline warehouse processes through automation. Design Power, Inc., known for their expertise in engineering design automation, showcased the capabilities of this new tool on May 8, 2025. The demo provides users with the ability to automate warehouse operations, signifying a significant step forward in enhancing efficiency. This development can potentially revolutionize the way warehouses function, bringing ease and modernization to the industry. For more information, individuals can visit the company's website at www.designpower.com.
news.headline: Design Power unveils Design++® Warehouse Configurator for Tekla Structures, automating warehouse design.

news.summary: In Claremont, California on May 8, 2025, LMA Consulting Group, Inc., a top expert in manufacturing supply chain strategy and transformation spearheaded by Lisa Anderson, MBA, CSCP, CLTD, President, has rolled out a fresh services framework. This innovative framework is designed to enhance manufacturers' comprehension of industry dynamics and improve their operational efficiency.
news.headline: Manufacturing expert Lisa Anderson introduces new services framework to clarify supply chain priorities for manufacturers.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, ExlService Holdings, Inc. revealed that Maurizio Nicolelli, the CFO, and John Kristoff, head of investor relations, will be attending upcoming investor conferences. The company, a prominent data and AI firm listed on NASDAQ under the symbol EXLS, shared this news.
news.headline: EXL to be at investor conferences; execs to attend. CFO Nicolelli and Investor Relations head Kristoff to participate.

news.summary: IonQ's first-quarter loss was reduced compared to the previous year, aligning with expectations. The company's revenue guidance for the June quarter was consistent with predictions. IonQ's recent acquisitions focus on communications and space, reflecting the growing interest in quantum computing stocks.
news.headline: IonQ sees smaller Q1 loss from last year. Revenue guidance for June quarter aligns with views, targets comms and space.

news.summary: The CEO of Instacart, Fidji Simo, will be departing from the company to take on the role of leading application development at OpenAI. This move has caused Instacart's stock to drop. The news article titled "OpenAI Hires Instacart Chief Executive To Lead Applications" was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Instacart CEO Fidji Simo joins OpenAI for app development; Instacart stock drops in response.

news.summary: The stock of Warner Bros. experienced a slight decline following mixed results, as compared to Disney which surpassed expectations. Meanwhile, Dow Jones, a major player in the industry, announced plans to launch a new resort in the United Arab Emirates. Warner Bros. attracted more subscribers than Disney, but their shares slid in light of the results. The information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Warner Bros. outpaces Disney in subscribers, stock slide. Disney meets estimates, plans new UAE resort. Warner shares lower.

news.summary: As a result of technological advancements, humanoid robots are being introduced to address the shortage of workers in monotonous and physically demanding roles. These robots could potentially help alleviate labor shortages and even provide care for seniors in need. This development showcases the increasing integration of robotics into various industries to combat the challenges posed by a lack of human workers.
news.headline: Humanoid robots may fill labor shortages, perform dull tasks, and care for seniors, as technology advances.

news.summary: In Q1, D-Wave announced a loss that was lower than anticipated, with revenue exceeding expectations. This positive performance has drawn attention from investors, who are closely watching the potential growth of quantum computing stocks. The company's earnings report has sparked interest in the market, with a focus on the future outlook for the industry.
news.headline: D-Wave beats Q1 loss estimates, surpasses revenue expectations, boosting quantum computing stock outlook.

news.summary: A company known for manufacturing Tasers is preparing to introduce a new type of dart capable of piercing clothing. Production for this new dart is set to begin next year. Despite challenges related to DOGE and tariffs, the company, Axon, has seen positive financial results, as indicated by a recent earnings report. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
news.headline: Axon's earnings rise despite challenges, plans new Taser dart. Stay strong amidst DOGE, tariffs.
Uber stock downgraded by Wedbush analysts due to "lack of catalysts" post Q1. Mixed results prompt dip.

news.summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE: FICO) from Bozeman, Montana, plans to conduct a private offering of $1.5 billion in aggregate principal amount of Senior Notes due 2033. The offering is exempt from registration under the Securities Act of 1933. These Notes will be senior unsecured obligations of FICO. The company intends to utilize the net proceeds from this offering for the repayment of certain obligations.
news.headline: FICO Announces Proposed Offering of $1.5 Billion in Senior Notes

news.summary: Highlighting the Fabrique Nationale US M240B machine gun and the Martial Colt Paterson Model 1839 percussion revolving rifle, along with a significant cased set of factory presentation Colts shipped in 1861, an eminent event in Denver on May 8, 2025 showcased these historical firearms. The gathering focused on attracting enthusiasts dedicated to preserving prominent arms and military memorabilia.
news.headline: Morphy's auction on May 13-15 includes NFA guns, rare firearms from 19th C., Civil War, & WWII. Features M240B machine gun, Colt Paterson rifle, and cased Colt set from 1861.

news.summary: In Boston on May 8, 2025, a new report titled "AI Chips for Data Centers and Cloud 2025-2035: Technologies, Market, Forecasts" by market intelligence firm IDTechEx predicts significant advancements by 2030. The report projects a rise in the deployment of AI data centers, the commercialization of AI, and improved performance. Key findings include a forecasted increase in AI data centers and cloud services, with the AI chip market expected to grow substantially. This growth is anticipated due to the expanding adoption of AI technologies across various industries. The report outlines a promising future for AI chips, predicting a robust market performance in the coming years.
news.headline: IDTechEx forecasts AI chip market to exceed $400 billion by 2030. AI data center deployment and commercialization on the rise.

news.summary: A prominent organization specializing in polar science and operations research is planning to deploy more drones to improve its conservation, research, and wildlife preservation in Antarctica. The initiative aims to bolster their efforts in safeguarding the region's ecosystem and studying its unique environment. By increasing the use of drones, the organization hopes to gather more data and insights crucial for their conservation and research activities. This move is part of their ongoing commitment to advancing knowledge about Antarctica and protecting its fragile ecosystem.
news.headline: AgEagle sold additional eBee VISION drones to British Antarctic Survey for polar research and conservation efforts.

news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on May 08, 2025, Star Bulk Carriers Corp. (Nasdaq: SBLK) disclosed its plan to unveil its first-quarter outcomes until March 31, 2025, post-market closure in New York on May 14, 2025. Following this, the management will conduct a conference call on May 15, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. ET, to delve into the Company's financial performance.
news.headline: Star Bulk to release Q1 2025 results on May 14, 2025. Conference call on May 15 at 11:00 a.m. ET. Wait for details.

news.summary: AIM ImmunoTech Inc. disclosed clinical trial results for their drug Ampligen at the Annual Meeting of the American Association of Immunologists in Honolulu, HI. The presentation was made by Pawel Kalinski, MD, PhD. The event took place from May 3-7, 2025. AIM is listed as AIM on the NYSE American and AIMI on the OTC Pink.
news.headline: AIM ImmunoTech presents Ampligen data at Annual Meeting of American Association of Immunologists; trials discussed by Pawel Kalinski, MD, PhD, in Honolulu on May 3-7, 2025.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Boca Raton, Florida, Springbig (OTCQB: SBIG), a prominent marketing automation software and customer loyalty solutions provider, welcomed three experienced executives to their leadership team. This move highlights the company’s dedication to expansion, creativity, and operational proficiency as it extends its SaaS platform and services throughout North America.
news.headline: Springbig hires 3 executives to drive growth, innovate, and scale services in North America.

news.summary: The Independent Data Monitoring Committee (IDMC) has assessed the study data and found no safety concerns, recommending that the study proceed as scheduled.
news.headline: GRI Bio's Phase 2a study shows positive anti-fibrotic effect in 12 IPF patients, IDMC advises study continuation.

news.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) recently secured a long-term agreement with Marubeni Corporation, involving the purchase of approximately 250,000 tonnes of low-carbon ammonia annually from ExxonMobil's Baytown, Texas plant. This facility is expected to generate nearly carbon-neutral hydrogen, capturing about 98% of CO2 emissions, which will then be utilized for producing low-carbon ammonia. The upcoming Baytown facility by ExxonMobil is anticipated to be the largest of its kind globally upon commencement. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Exxon Mobil signs deal with Marubeni to sell 250,000 tonnes of low-carbon ammonia annually from Baytown facility. Startup will be world's largest.

news.summary: In a recent collaboration, Petfolk has teamed up with Radimal to introduce AI-powered radiology and specialist support to its expanding network. This partnership aims to improve diagnostics and streamline workflows for veterinary teams at Petfolk. The partnership was announced in Red Bank, N.J. on May 8, 2025. Radimal, a prominent provider of veterinary radiology services, incorporates AI assessments to enhance accuracy and efficiency for veterinarians. This collaboration is set to make a significant impact by leveraging advanced technology, benefiting the veterinary community and pet care sector.
news.headline: Petfolk partners with Radimal for exclusive teleradiology services, using AI to enhance diagnostics; Red Bank, NJ; May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Media can get an early look at ideal products for gift lists and roundups as Consumer Product Events, a platform connecting products with press, introduces its summer collection. The handpicked selection includes products chosen for their uniqueness and quality, within various categories. The platform serves as a matchmaker for brands and reporters seeking standout items, ideally suited for gift guides and listicles. This exclusive summer edit aims to assist journalists in finding compelling products to feature in their upcoming content.
news.headline: Consumer Product Events releases curated summer edit of favorite products for reporters, including gift guides and listicles.

news.summary: URS Capital Partners has completed its eighth acquisition since January 2024 with the purchase of The Palms at Edgewater, a 288-unit Class A multifamily complex in Summerville, South Carolina. The firm's ability to swiftly navigate a challenging market is highlighted by this latest transaction. The acquisition was finalized on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: URS Capital Partners acquires The Palms at Edgewater in Summerville, SC - 288-unit community. 8th deal since Jan 2024.

news.summary: Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) and MARA Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: MARA) are gearing up to release their earnings reports after the bell on Thursday. Investors are closely watching as Coinbase has seen a 29.8% increase in the past month, climbing to $196.56 per share. Analysts from Citi, JPMorgan, and Rosenblatt have set an average price target of $268.67 for COIN, suggesting a 30% upside potential. However, technical indicators are currently in a tug-of-war, creating uncertainty among investors. On the other hand, MARA is also set to report its earnings, and market watchers are monitoring both stocks for any bullish or bearish signals in the volatile crypto market.
news.headline: COIN and MARA to report Q1 earnings; COIN bullish with 29.8% climb but technicals uncertain; COIN stock at $196.56.

news.summary: Expansa, a respected company specializing in mobile water solutions and outsourced purification services, revealed today an impressive 1,198% surge in revenue for its resin regeneration sector when compared to the previous year. This substantial growth was primarily fueled by a growing demand from customers and a reduction in market capacity.
news.headline: Expansa sees 1,198% revenue increase in resin regeneration division to meet growing Gulf Coast demand.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Las Vegas, MSPAlliance® revealed that David Kubick has been appointed as a strategic advisor. The association, recognized as the largest for cloud and managed service providers globally, made this announcement. Kubick, boasting prior experience in sales, MSP channel, and executive positions for various companies, will now serve in this critical role.
news.headline: MSPAlliance names David Kubick as strategic advisor; world's largest assoc for cloud & MSPs.

news.summary: A company based in MAITLAND, Florida, on May 8, 2025, announced major developments aimed at enhancing project delivery efficiency. Castillo Engineering, a prominent national firm specializing in solar and energy storage engineering, has allocated a substantial $2.5 million towards acquiring advanced software and bolstering leadership. This strategic investment is intended to streamline project operations and improve overall efficiency.
news.headline: Castillo Engineering invests $2.5 million in project tools for market expansion, enhancing project delivery efficiency.

news.summary: On May 7 and 8, 2025, the Insurers' Real Asset Forum was held in Philadelphia, organized by InsuranceAUM.com. The event gathered prominent insurance investment experts for in-depth conversations and future-oriented perspectives on Asset-Backed securities.
news.headline: Successful Insurers' Real Asset Forum by InsuranceAUM.com in Philadelphia on May 7-8 with leading professionals, now heading to Chicago.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Las Vegas, Snap-Loc Cargo Control Systems launched a new product, the Customizable Wood Dolly System. This innovative system caters to the varied requirements of customers seeking dynamic cargo management solutions. The initiative aims to provide increased flexibility and customization options for users.
news.headline: Snap-Loc launches Customizable Wood Dolly System in Vegas; aims to meet varied customer needs with innovative solution.

news.summary: Nokia Corporation (NOK) shares are down in premarket trading as the company announces the release of its latest fiber-optic LAN solution, Aurelis Optical LAN. This new solution is designed to meet the evolving connectivity needs of businesses, offering a future-proof option with fiber's durability, high performance, and efficiency for both in-building and campus environments. Optical LAN technology presents a significant advancement, reducing cabling needs by up to 70% and power consumption by 40% compared to traditional copper-based networks. With the potential to cut Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) by up to 50%, Optical LAN is seen as a cost-effective choice. For more detailed information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Nokia introduces Aurelis Optical LAN, fiber-optic LAN solution with up to 70% less cabling and 40% less power usage. TCO may decrease by up to 50%.

news.summary: For the first time, Judi Health introduces the Unified Claims Processing™ platform, providing a seamless pharmacy and medical benefit experience for health plan sponsors and members. This initiative was launched in New York on May 8, 2025. Capital Rx, Inc., the enterprise health technology company and benefit administrator, is spearheading this advancement.
news.headline: Judi Health™ wins Best Healthcare InsurTech Solution in the 9th MedTech Breakthrough Awards, offering Unified Claims Processing™ for health plans.

news.summary: In Hamilton, New Jersey on May 8, 2025, Integrated Analytical Solutions (IAS), a leading provider of analytical testing services, unveiled its new cannabis testing facility in the area. This laboratory aims to enhance safety, quality, and transparency in the cannabis industry.
news.headline: Integrated Analytical Solutions opens new cannabis testing lab in Hamilton, NJ; focuses on safety, quality, and transparency.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025 in Orlando, Florida, Northern Jet shared that Melanie Jones has been named as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the company. This decision is seen as pivotal for Northern Jet as it aims for further expansion. With more than twenty years of experience in financial management, Melanie Jones is expected to bring valuable expertise to the executive team.
news.headline: Northern Jet names Melanie Jones as CFO, boosting leadership team amid strategic growth. Melanie has 20 years of financial experience.

news.summary: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, based in Chicago, made public the implementation of a 1-for-30 reverse stock split for its common stock. This action will come into effect as of the market opening on May 13, 2025.
news.headline: Cardio Diagnostics Holdings, Inc. to implement 1-for-30 reverse stock split on May 13, 2025.
